description: Decorative and task lighting assessed by output, color quality, efficiency, and dimming behavior.

attributes.label: Light Output
attributes.explanation: Lumens determine usable brightness, not watts.

attributes.label: Color Temperature
attributes.explanation: Choose warm/neutral/cool temperatures by room function.

attributes.label: CRI
attributes.explanation: Higher CRI improves color accuracy for kitchens, baths, and vanities.

attributes.label: Dimmable
attributes.explanation: Not all LED fixtures are dimmer-compatible with existing switches.

attributes.label: Wet/Damp Rating
attributes.explanation: Bathroom exteriors and outdoor areas require suitable location ratings.

watch_out_factors.title: Integrated LED Replacement
watch_out_factors.description: Integrated modules can be harder to replace than bulb-based fixtures.

watch_out_factors.title: Dimmer Flicker
watch_out_factors.description: Pair fixture and dimmer by manufacturer compatibility list.

buyer_guide_key_points: Size fixture to room and ceiling height.
Use CRI 90+ for true color rendering in task zones.
contractor_questions: Will this fixture require new junction box support?
Can we put this fixture on existing dimmer circuits?
What lumen target is appropriate for this room size?
